steps.title: Identify the Rhetorical Goal
steps.content:
The student must emphasize the order—which work entered public domain first, which second.

The notes provide specific years (2020 for Billy Budd, Sailor, 2021 for The Common Reader).

A choice that accomplishes this goal must show clear sequence, not just confirm both are now in the public domain.

steps.title: Match the Sequence
steps.content:
Choice C explicitly marks the sequence by stating Billy Budd, Sailor “entered the public domain in 2020” and The Common Reader is “following in 2021”—the word “following” combined with the paired years establishes unmistakable order.

Choices A and D omit the dates and treat both as simultaneous; choice B references only 2021 and muddies the sequence.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
